evaluators.name: Cheapest 2t Electric Chain Hoist Next Week with Depot Pickup
evaluators.description: Checks if the user hired the cheapest qualifying ≥2t electric chain hoist for a 3-day period next week with depot pickup and quantity 1.

evaluators.name: Two 1t Manual Hoists for Upcoming Weekend under $60/day with Standard Delivery
evaluators.description: Checks if the user hired at least two units of qualifying 1t manual chain hoists for the upcoming Saturday–Sunday with rate < $60/day and rating ≥ 4, using standard delivery.

evaluators.name: Quote with 1t Manual Hoist and Compatible 2t Beam Trolley for 5 Days at Postcode 10001
evaluators.description: Checks if the user created a quote containing one 1t manual hoist and one compatible 2t beam trolley, both for the same 5-day period at postcode 10001, and submitted the quote.

evaluators.name: Lightest 3t Electric Hoist under $150/day Saved to Wishlist after Comparison
evaluators.description: Checks if the user compared at least three qualifying 3t electric hoists under $150/day and saved the lightest one to their wishlist.

evaluators.name: Scaffold Hoist ≥20m for Sat–Mon 3-Day Hire with Guest Checkout Details Entered
evaluators.description: Checks if the user added a qualifying scaffold hoist (lift height ≥ 20 m) for a Saturday–Monday 3-day hire to the cart and entered contact and address details in checkout.

evaluators.name: Account Registration and Saving an Electric Hoist Safety Guide
evaluators.description: Checks if the user registered an account and saved at least one electric hoist safety guide from the safety resources section to their saved resources.

evaluators.name: Longest-Chain 1.5t Lever Hoist under $75/day Compared and Hired for 3 Days Next Month
evaluators.description: Checks if the user compared three qualifying 1.5t lever hoists (≤ $75/day), selected the one with the longest chain length, and added one unit to the cart for a 3-day hire starting on the first day of next month.

evaluators.name: Outdoor-Rated Electric Hoist IP65+ Hired for 10 Days with Site Delivery to 30301 and Rooftop Note
evaluators.description: Checks if the user hired an outdoor-rated electric chain hoist with IP rating ≥ IP65 for 10 days starting two weeks from baseline, with site delivery to postcode 30301 and a rooftop installation note in checkout.
